title: Design System Package Structure
content: Every brand in the Powerhouse design systems repository follows a consistent package structure. Core files shared across all brands: index.html (design system overview with sidebar navigation), styleguide.html (component and typography reference), colors.css (CSS custom property token definitions for light and dark themes), presentation.html (slide templates), documents.html (document templates including cover pages, reports, and invoices), logos/ directory (brand logos in SVG format), illustrations/ directory (brand illustration assets), and illustrations.html (illustration gallery and usage guidelines). PDF exports of document templates are provided in both light and dark variants. Achra and Vetra additionally include: website/ directory with 16 page templates, animation/ directory with logo animation references, and presentation-reference.html with exported SVG slides. Powerhouse additionally includes: card-design-guidelines.html, website/powerhouse-io.html (website recreation), and website-reference/ screenshots. Source: https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems.
description: Each brand contains index.html, styleguide.html, colors.css, presentation.html, documents.html, logos/, and illustrations/.
